_meta.source: perks/weapons: darkanddarker.wiki.spellsandguns.com/Barbarian; base stats & skills: api.darkerdb.com/v1/classes (merged by scripts/build-classes.mjs)

name: Barbarian
perk_slot_rule: 1 slot + 1 additional slot every 5 levels; 4 slots at level 15 (max)

perks.name: Axe Specialization
perks.effect: While using axes: +3 Physical Buff Weapon Damage

perks.name: Berserker
perks.effect: +2% Physical Power Bonus and +0.5% Move Speed Bonus for every 10% of max health missing (up to 20% / 5%)

perks.name: Carnage
perks.effect: After striking 2+ players within 1.5s: +40% Physical Power Bonus for 3s

perks.name: Crush
perks.effect: Destroy unreinforced containers in one strike with two-handed weapons; +1 Impact Power on two-handed attacks

perks.name: Heavy Swing
perks.effect: Targets you hit suffer 2x duration of movement speed reduction effects

perks.name: Morale Boost
perks.effect: 25% Max Health healing after killing a player

perks.name: Potion Chugger
perks.effect: 1.2x healing and shielding potency from potions, with reduced duration

perks.name: Savage
perks.effect: Without chest armor: +10% Physical Power Bonus and +1 Impact Power

perks.name: Two-Hander
perks.effect: With two-handed weapons: +5% Physical Power Bonus and +10% Armor Penetration

skills.name: Achilles Strike
skills.effect: Strike a target, reducing their move speed bonus by for seconds. While debuffed, each time the target moves they receive physical damage. Cooldown: seconds

skills.name: Blood Exchange
skills.effect: Lose of maximum health, but gain action speed for seconds and heal for of damage dealt while active. Cooldown: seconds

skills.name: Finishing Blow
skills.effect: Your next attack deals an additional true physical damage. If the target’s health is or lower after the attack, they are instantly killed. Cooldown: seconds

skills.name: Grappling Hook
skills.effect: Throws a grappling rope at a target up to 4m away, pulling them toward you. Cooldown: seconds

skills.name: Hurl Weapon
skills.effect: Throws an axe to deal weapon damage. Can only be used when an axe is equipped as your primary weapon. Cooldown: seconds

skills.name: Rage
skills.effect: Gain strength, move speed bonus. While active, lose physical damage reduction for seconds. Cooldown: seconds

skills.name: Reckless Attack
skills.effect: Grants an additional armor penetration on your next attack, but reduces your armor rating by while active. The effect is consumed when you hit a target or object with a melee attack. Cooldown: seconds

skills.name: Savage Roar
skills.effect: Frightens all enemies within a 7.5m range radius for seconds reducing their physical damage bonus by and move speed bonus by. Cooldown: seconds

skills.name: War Cry
skills.effect: Gain max health bonus for seconds. This effect applies to yourself and allies within a 7.5m radius. Cooldown: seconds

skills.name: War Sacrifice
skills.effect: While active, gain all attributes. In exchange, lose of your maximum health over seconds. Cooldown: seconds

skills.name: Whirlwind
skills.effect: Spin rapidly with a two-handed weapon, dealing of weapon damage to all nearby enemies. While spinning, your weapon cannot be interrupted by any impact. Cooldown: seconds
